title: Beille Oak Wood Stainless Steel Barrel Classic Bakers Rolling Pin Baking 13" 17"
description:
Classic in design but with a modern stainless steel barrel, include this bakers rolling pin from Beille with your baking supplies, suitable for just about any type of dough! (Please note the lengths denote the full lengths of the rolling pins, not the barrel lengths). Why choose stainless steel over wood? It’s mostly personal preference, of course, but a stainless steel barrel holds a cooler temperature, meaning this rolling pin is perfect for rolling out pie crust or other dough, that rely on deposits of chilled butter to later produce a delicate flake; chill the rolling pin in a cool area or fridge if desired to help keep dough even and consistent

Beille Oak Wood Stainless Steel Barrel Classic Bakers Rolling Pin Baking 13" 17"

Classic in design but with a modern stainless steel barrel, include this bakers rolling pin from Beille with your baking supplies, suitable for just about any type of dough! (Please note the lengths denote the full lengths of the rolling pins, not the barrel lengths).

Why choose stainless steel over wood? It’s mostly personal preference, of course, but a stainless steel barrel holds a cooler temperature, meaning this rolling pin is perfect for rolling out pie crust or other dough, that rely on deposits of chilled butter to later produce a delicate flake; chill the rolling pin in a cool area or fridge if desired to help keep dough even and consistent.

Key Features

  • 13 OR 17 INCH ROLLING PIN: Classic in design but with a modern stainless steel barrel, include this rolling pin with your baking supplies for any dough recipe; The stainless steel surface of the cookie rolling pin is completely smooth for perfectly rolled dough every time
  • PERFECT PASTRY: Chill the rolling pin in a cool area or fridge if desired to help keep dough even and consistent; stainless steel has the cooling properties of marble stone without the bulk or heaviness, making it suitable to work with even the most delicate of pastries, fondant, cookie dough and more
  • STAINLESS STEEL: Made from stainless steel, this rolling pin is perfect for rolling out pie crust or other doughs that rely on solid deposits of chilled butter to produce delicate flakes; stainless steel construction will ensure longevity and maximum durability in the kitchen
  • OAK WOOD HANDLES: Featuring dense, durable and contoured oak wood handles, they provide a comfortable and secure grip when rolling out dough; handles attach to a full length steel axle for easy and effortless rolling
  • ROLLING PIN CARE: Handwash with warm, soapy water after each use and dry thoroughly; Never soak or submerge in water or put in dishwasher

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BEI4PCKIUS
  • UPC: 810131706234
  • Color: Silver

Stainless steel has the cooling properties of marble stone but without the added bulk and heaviness, making it suitable to work with even the most delicate of pastries, fondant, cookie dough and more. The stainless steel finish also ensures a completely smooth finish for perfectly rolled dough every time! And, this classic bakers rolling pins innate stainless steel construction material will naturally ensure longevity and maximum durability in the kitchen for the effortless rolling out of all kinds of dough.

And lastly, featuring dense and durable, contoured oak wood handles, they provide a comfortable and secure grip when rolling out dough; handles attach to a full length steel axle for easy and effortless rolling. When finished using the stainless steel rolling pin, hand wash with warm, soapy water after each use and dry thoroughly; Never soak or submerge in water or put in dishwasher. A great gift for any baking enthusiast or professional patissier, chef or home cook, or as a home essentials item to include with your arsenal of baking supplies! Choose from 13 inch or 17 inch full lengths.

The 13 inch rolling pin has a barrel length of 6 inches, while the 17 inch rolling pin has a barrel length of 10 inches.
